data.title: Surge Copper grants 2,337,500 RSUs to employees, execs and 1,750,000 DSUs to directors based on TSX average price.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on Sept. 19, 2025, Surge Copper Corp. granted long-term equity-based incentive awards under its Share Compensation Plan. The awards include 2,337,500 restricted share units (RSUs) for employees and executives, as well as 1,750,000 deferred share units (DSUs) for non-executive directors. These awards were given based on the 5-day volume weighted average price on the TSX Venture Exchange. Surge Copper Corp. trades under the tickers TSXV: SURG, OTCQB: SRGXF, and Frankfurt: G6D2.

data.title: Globus Maritime Limited reported Q2 revenue of $9.5 million & H1 revenue of $18.2 million in 2025, with Q2 Adjusted EBITDA at $3.2 million & H1 at $5.2 million. The daily Time Charter Equivalent rate was $11,444 per day in Q2 and $10,274 per day in H1. Salary earned was $9.5 million in Q2 2025, and $18.2 million in H1 2025. Adjusted EBITDA was $3.2 million in Q2 2025 and $5.2 million in H1 2025.  The vessels are currently engaged in short-term time charters below one year duration. The company sold a vessel for $8.55 million in February 2025. Revenue in Q2 2025 decreased by 22% compared to Q2 2024, attributed to unfavorable market conditions.
data.description: Globus Maritime Limited reported unaudited financial results for Q2 and H1 2025: Revenue was $9.5 million in Q2 and $18.2 million in H1. Adjusted EBITDA was $3.2 million in Q2 and $5.2 million in H1. Time Charter Equivalent was $11,444 per day in Q2 and $10,274 per day in H1. They own and operate nine dry bulk carriers (6 Kamsarmax, 3 Ultramax) with an average age of 7.8 years. All vessels are operating on short-term time charters. Rates saw volatility due to regulatory and geopolitical factors but ended strong. Globe is expecting two new Ultramaxes in a year. They recently sold a vessel for $8.55 million. Net loss in Q2 2025 was $1.9 million. Revenue for Q2 2025 was $9.5 million. Time Charter Equivalent decreased by 22% to $11,444 per day in Q2 2025. The decrease was due to unfavorable market conditions in bulk shipping.

data.title: Storelocal Storage Concord opens new facility at 4900 Marsh Drive, Concord, CA, offering modern storage solutions.
data.description: The latest facility of Storelocal, Storelocal Storage Concord, has officially opened its doors in Concord, California at 4900 Marsh Drive with a zip code of 94520. This state-of-the-art property aims to serve the local community with a range of modern, secure, and convenient storage solutions.

data.title: Algernon Pharmaceuticals approved new Preferred Share Class with over 93% of votes in favor at shareholders meeting.
data.description: Algernon Pharmaceuticals Inc., a Canadian healthcare company based in Vancouver, revealed the outcomes of its recent annual and special shareholder meeting. The company proposed a resolution to modify its authorized share structure and Articles to allow for an unlimited amount of Preferred Shares, with a specific allocation for Series 1. Over 93% of the votes cast were in favor of this resolution. The company's shares are listed on the CSE under AGN, Frankfurt as AGW0, and OTCQB as AGNPF.

data.title: New Dogecoin ETF off to a strong start, but a riskier fund by Rex-Osprey is in the works, offering leveraged exposure to DOJE.
data.description: Rex-Osprey has recently submitted paperwork for a more aggressive ETF that offers investors amplified exposure to its current Dogecoin fund, DOJE. The new ETF is set to provide leveraged returns and was introduced on Thursday.

data.title: Alliance formed to boost low-carbon materials; Amazon, Prologis, Meta joining joint purchase of sustainable concrete certificates to support green building.
data.description: A new collaboration between RMI and the Center for Green Market Activation is facilitating a unique opportunity for prominent companies like Amazon, Prologis, and Meta to collectively purchase sustainable concrete attribute certificates. This initiative aims to support advanced production facilities and promote sustainable practices.

data.title: Kansas City Royals and Sun Life raise $50,000 for Boys & Girls Clubs of Greater Kansas City through Strikeout Diabetes campaign.
data.description: In Kansas City, Missouri, on September 19, 2025, Sun Life U.S. and The Kansas City Royals Foundation collaborated for the eighth consecutive year, collecting $50,000 for the Boys & Girls Clubs of Greater Kansas City as part of their yearly Strikeout Diabetes initiative. The donation was officially handed over by Sun Life.

data.title: Village Super Market, Inc. (NSD-VLGEA) declares $0.25 dividend per Class A share and $0.1625 per Class B share; payable Oct 23, 2025.
data.description: On September 19, 2025, in Springfield, New Jersey, the Board of Directors of Village Super Market, Inc. (NSD-VLGEA) announced quarterly cash dividends. Shareholders holding Class A common shares will receive $0.25 per share, while those holding Class B common shares will receive $0.1625 per share. The dividends are scheduled to be paid on October 23, 2025, to shareholders on record as of October 2, 2025.

data.title: NVIDIA and Berkeley Lab develop HENS, a weather prediction tool, providing supercomputer-level forecast with lower cost and power.
data.description: NVIDIA and Berkeley Lab have joined forces to unveil HENS, a pioneering machine learning solution aimed at forecasting extreme weather events. This innovative tool provides supercomputer-level predictions while significantly cutting down on both computational requirements and associated expenses. Explore further details on this groundbreaking advancement.

data.title: Mr. Cooper Group Inc. Board declared $2 dividend for common stock, record date on Sept 29, 2025.
data.description: Mr. Cooper Group Inc. declared a dividend today for holders of common stock, par value $0.01 per share, consisting of $2.00 in cash per share. The record date for determining the entitlement to the dividend is September 29, 2025.

data.title: Pintec (Nasdaq: PT) releases unaudited financial results for H1 2025. Providing financial services to SMEs in China.
data.description: On September 19, 2025, in Beijing, Pintec Technology Holdings Limited (Nasdaq: PT), a company listed on the Nasdaq, disclosed its unaudited financial information. Pintec specializes in offering technology-driven financial and digital solutions to micro, small, and medium-sized enterprises in China.

data.title: RBI advised shareholders to reject Ocehan's mini-tender offer for 50,000 shares, 0.02% of total.
data.description: Restaurant Brands International Inc. (QSR) has received notice of an unsolicited mini-tender offer from Ocehan LLC to acquire up to 50,000 of RBI's common shares, representing about 0.02% of the total shares outstanding. This offer was made on September 19, 2025, and RBI trades on both the NYSE and TSX under the symbols QSR.

data.title: AAM upsizes offering to $850 million for 6.375% senior secured notes and senior unsecured notes.
data.description: In Detroit, on September 19, 2025, American Axle & Manufacturing Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: AXL) revealed that its subsidiary, American Axle & Manufacturing, Inc. , has set the price for its latest offering of $850 million of 6.375% senior notes.

data.title: Sunrise Manor Nursing & Rehabilitation Center unveils new leadership, plans for renovations to enhance care services.
data.description: Sunrise Manor Nursing & Rehabilitation Center offers top-quality short-term rehabilitation and long-term skilled nursing care in a caring, patient-centered setting. The center provides expert therapy programs, advanced clinical services, and compassionate staff committed to delivering exceptional care.
